title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1554 / 57 OG No. 4, 625 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2743, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 67, page 470 of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"67. Municipal building, Hinundayan P10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
